topics.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
topics.description: Prompt works that compress a complete story world into a single crystal ball, using refraction, scale, and miniature scenes.

en.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
en.description: Prompt works that compress a complete story world into a single crystal ball, using refraction, scale, and miniature scenes.

zh-CN.title: 水晶球叙事
zh-CN.description: 把完整叙事世界压缩进一颗水晶球，通过折射、尺度和微缩场景呈现。

topics.title: Mirror Worlds
topics.description: A prompt set about showing the same fictional person across different ages, rooms, and timelines.

en.title: Mirror Worlds
en.description: A prompt set about showing the same fictional person across different ages, rooms, and timelines.

zh-CN.title: 镜像世界
zh-CN.description: 一组关于同一虚构人物跨年龄、房间与时间线同框呈现的提示词作品。

topics.title: Material Swaps
topics.description: Prompt works that transform familiar objects into physically convincing alternate materials.

en.title: Material Swaps
en.description: Prompt works that transform familiar objects into physically convincing alternate materials.

zh-CN.title: 材质错位
zh-CN.description: 把熟悉物体转换成物理上可信的反常材质。

topics.title: High-Speed Moments
topics.description: Prompt works that freeze ultra-fast physical impacts with controlled studio clarity.

en.title: High-Speed Moments
en.description: Prompt works that freeze ultra-fast physical impacts with controlled studio clarity.

zh-CN.title: 高速摄影定格
zh-CN.description: 用受控棚拍清晰定格高速物理冲击瞬间。

topics.title: SEM Microscopy
topics.description: A prompt set exploring scanning electron microscope imagery with scientific texture, scale, and specimen realism.

en.title: SEM Microscopy
en.description: A prompt set exploring scanning electron microscope imagery with scientific texture, scale, and specimen realism.

zh-CN.title: 扫描电镜显微摄影
zh-CN.description: 一组探索扫描电子显微镜图像的作品，强调科学质感、尺度线索和样本真实感。

packages.title: Crystal Ball Seasons
packages.description: A three-image series that keeps one crystal ball, brass claw stand, and dark oracle table consistent while the miniature world inside changes across seasons.
packages.creative_direction: Series package focused on object continuity and refractive storytelling: same crystal ball and tabletop setup, different seasonal narrative worlds inside the sphere.

en.title: Crystal Ball Seasons
en.description: A three-image series that keeps one crystal ball, brass claw stand, and dark oracle table consistent while the miniature world inside changes across seasons.

zh-CN.title: 水晶球四季叙事
zh-CN.description: 三张图保持同一颗水晶球、黄铜爪形底座和深色占卜桌不变，只改变球内的季节微缩世界。

packages.title: Three Eras
packages.description: Three connected images that keep one fictional woman recognizable across Victorian, neon apartment, and desert observatory scenes.
packages.creative_direction: Series package focused on character identity continuity: same fictional woman, similar wardrobe motif, three connected environments, reference-chain consistency.

en.title: Three Eras
en.description: Three connected images that keep one fictional woman recognizable across Victorian, neon apartment, and desert observatory scenes.

zh-CN.title: 三重时代
zh-CN.description: 三张连续图像，在维多利亚客厅、霓虹公寓和沙漠天文台中保持同一位虚构女性的可识别身份。

packages.title: Timeline Collision Hero
packages.description: One wide cinematic image combining three life stages of the same fictional woman in a folded mirror room.
packages.creative_direction: Single-image package demo. This overlaps with the existing character-portrait series and should be treated as a structure example, not the ideal next creative direction.

en.title: Timeline Collision Hero
en.description: One wide cinematic image combining three life stages of the same fictional woman in a folded mirror room.

zh-CN.title: 时间线碰撞主视觉
zh-CN.description: 一张宽幅电影感图像，把同一位虚构女性的三个人生阶段合并到折叠镜厅中。

packages.title: Glass Rose Study
packages.description: A three-image continuity series about the same transparent glass rose moving through studio, rain window, and museum case settings.
packages.creative_direction: Series focused on material consistency: one fragile rose made entirely of clear glass, same petal geometry and stem silhouette, changing environment and lighting.

en.title: Glass Rose Study
en.description: A three-image continuity series about the same transparent glass rose.

zh-CN.title: 玻璃玫瑰研究
zh-CN.description: 三张图保持同一朵透明玻璃玫瑰，在不同环境中变化。

packages.title: Ten Independent Impact Freezes
packages.description: Ten independent high-speed studio images designed to exercise the 10-concurrency queue path from prompted meta to finished images.
packages.creative_direction: Queue validation package: ten independent high-speed macro impact prompts share one black studio lighting language so the runner can fill all 10 concurrent slots. This is not a continuity series and uses no reference images.

en.title: Ten Independent Impact Freezes
en.description: Ten independent high-speed studio images for testing the full queued generation path.

zh-CN.title: 十张独立高速定格
zh-CN.description: 十张独立高速棚拍图，用来验证完整队列生成链路。

packages.title: Reference Fanout
packages.description: A ten-image dependency series: one acrylic cube reference image followed by nine variations that preserve the same object and studio setup.
packages.creative_direction: True continuity series for queue validation: image 01 establishes object identity; images 02-10 depend on 01 and should run as a fanout batch with --ref once the reference is done.

en.title: Reference Fanout
en.description: One reference image followed by nine dependent continuity variations.

zh-CN.title: 参考图扇出系列
zh-CN.description: 一张基准参考图，后续九张依赖它保持主体连续。

packages.title: Pollen Micro City
packages.description: A single-image package presenting a pollen grain as a monumental SEM landscape without leaving the language of scientific microscopy.
packages.creative_direction: Single grayscale SEM micrograph focused on specimen realism and scale cues; no fantasy illustration, no color poster treatment, no multi-panel layout.

en.title: Pollen Micro City
en.description: A single-image package presenting a pollen grain as a monumental SEM landscape without leaving the language of scientific microscopy.

zh-CN.title: 花粉微型城市
zh-CN.description: 一个单图包，把花粉粒呈现成具有纪念碑尺度的 SEM 地形，同时保持科学显微摄影语言。

images.title: Spring Oracle
images.description: A spring miniature world appears inside a crystal ball on an antique oracle table.

en.title: Spring Oracle
en.description: A spring miniature world appears inside a crystal ball on an antique oracle table.

zh-CN.title: 春日预言球
zh-CN.description: 一座春日微缩世界出现在古董占卜桌上的水晶球内部。

alt.en: A photorealistic crystal ball containing a tiny spring landscape on a dark oracle table.
alt.zh-CN: 一颗写实水晶球位于深色占卜桌上，球内有春日微缩景观。

generation.runner_notes: No reference image required. Queue can run this image directly from prompt.

zh-CN.title: 维多利亚客厅

en.description: A grayscale SEM-style image of a pollen grain whose real microstructure suggests a miniature city without becoming an illustration.

zh-CN.title: 花粉微型城市
zh-CN.description: 一张灰阶 SEM 风格图像，花粉粒的真实微观结构暗示微型城市，但不变成插画。

alt.en: A grayscale SEM-style pollen grain with spikes and pores on a dark microscope stub.
alt.zh-CN: 一颗带尖刺和孔洞结构的灰阶扫描电镜风格花粉粒，位于深色样品台上。

generation.runner_notes: No reference image required. Queue can run this image directly from prompt.
